articles.title: New 'No 10 North' plan will rebalance power in Britain, Burnham promises
articles.description: The man most likely to be the next prime minister says his devolution plans would "drive good growth in every postcode".

articles.title: Henry Zeffman: Andy Burnham offers a blueprint for his premiership

articles.title: Resident doctors in England accept pay deal and end strikes
